messages.text: A deep wintry stillness drags you into forced hibernation; you slump helpless and unable to act.
{name} slumps into a forced hibernation, stilled helpless by a wintry chill.
The forced hibernation releases you and warmth creeps back into your limbs.
{name} stirs and shakes off the forced hibernation.
{name} is locked in a forced hibernation, helpless and unable to act.
